$comment: This is an example of ERC-7730 display definition for an ERC-20 token contract, intended as an interface definition to be included in other files.

fields.label: Spender
fields.description: The contract address authorized to transfer your tokens on your behalf. Verify this is a protocol you recognize.

fields.label: Amount
fields.description: The maximum total amount of your tokens this address may transfer on your behalf, or 'Unlimited' for approvals with no limit.
